revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Script/doc/id-unk/core]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2519 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing all templates with more than two uses on 2024-12-19

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
